data.description: The Overview board for the `work_sdlc` workflow currently hides terminal-state columns. Change the default so all columns are visible on first load, and group the terminal states (Shipped, Deferred, Abandoned) into a single "Terminated" column. Each card in the Terminated column must display its specific state as a label, with a distinct color per state so Shipped items stand out at a glance. Users may hide any column via a per-column control, and a "Restore all columns" button must re-show every hidden column.
